narrative:
Monroe Township (precinct in Pickaway County) has 863 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
